tagline: Your One-Stop Shop for All Areas of Landscaping

hero.headline:
23 Years Transforming Arizona
Outdoor Living
hero.subheadline: Your yard deserves more than just maintenance. Greenscapes Landcare is the family-owned team that handles everything from landscape design and irrigation to pools and hardscapes, so you get one call, one crew, and one beautiful result.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Outdoor Solutions<br class="hidden md:block">Under One Roof
services.subtitle: Stop juggling five different contractors. From the first sketch of your landscape design to the last tile on your pool, Greenscapes handles every phase of your outdoor transformation.

cards.title: Landscape Design & Installation
cards.description: Full residential and commercial landscape transformations including excavating, grading, colorscaping, and drought-tolerant desert design tailored to Arizona living.

cards.title: Irrigation & Water Management
cards.description: Weathermatic smart irrigation systems that deliver an average 38% water savings. Installation, maintenance, and repair by certified technicians.

cards.title: Hardscapes & Outdoor Living
cards.description: Custom pavers, BBQ islands, fireplaces, fire pits, and block work that turn your backyard into the outdoor entertaining space you have always wanted.

cards.title: Commercial Maintenance
cards.description: Full-service turf, shrub, tree care, fertilization, weed control, and pest management for apartment complexes, HOAs, and commercial properties.

cards.title: Tree Service & Removal
cards.description: Professional tree trimming, removal, and fertilization through our sister company Turning Leaf, LLC. Safe, licensed, and fully insured work on every job.

cards.title: Pool Design & Construction
cards.description: Custom swimming pool design, construction, and repair services through Pool Hub, LLC. From concept drawings to your first splash.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Outdoor Space

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Consultation
steps.description: Tell us your vision. We visit your property, listen to what you want, and deliver an honest, detailed estimate within 48 hours. No pressure, no obligation.

steps.title: We Design & Build It Right
steps.description: Our experienced crews handle every detail from design through installation. Licensed, bonded, insured, and backed by 23 years of Arizona outdoor expertise.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Outdoor Paradise
steps.description: Step into a finished space that looks exactly like you imagined. And with ongoing maintenance plans available, it stays that way year-round.

about.label: Why Arizona Trusts Greenscapes
about.headline: Family-Owned, Community-Rooted, Built to Last
about.description: Since 2003, the Greenscapes family has been transforming outdoor spaces across the Phoenix metro. What started as a small crew specializing in apartment communities has grown into a full-service landscape company trusted by homeowners, property managers, and commercial clients throughout Maricopa County. Every project gets the same attention to detail whether it is a backyard patio or a 200-unit apartment complex.

features.title: Licensed, Bonded & Insured
features.description: Full licensing and insurance on every project. You are protected from the first shovel to the final walkthrough.

features.title: One-Stop Outdoor Solutions
features.description: Landscaping, irrigation, hardscapes, trees, and pools all under one roof. No more coordinating between multiple contractors.

features.title: Water-Smart Certified
features.description: EPA WaterSense designated and Weathermatic certified. We build landscapes that look lush while cutting your water bill by up to 38%.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project gets a detailed written estimate upfront. No hidden fees, no change-order surprises, no contractor runaround.

guarantee.headline: Our "Done Right" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If any part of your project does not meet the standard we promised, we come back and fix it at no additional cost. That commitment has kept us in business for 23 years and earned us an A+ BBB rating. Your satisfaction is not negotiable.

faqs.question: How soon can you start my project?
faqs.answer: Most residential projects begin within 1-2 weeks of signing. Commercial maintenance contracts can start even sooner. We will give you a clear timeline during your free consultation so there are no surprises.

faqs.question: Do you handle both residential and commercial work?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We started in apartment complexes and multi-housing communities, and have expanded to serve homeowners, HOAs, retail centers, and office parks across Maricopa County. Every property gets the same professional treatment.

faqs.question: Can you really handle landscaping, pools, and hardscapes?
faqs.answer: Yes. Through Greenscapes and our sister companies Turning Leaf LLC and Pool Hub LLC, we cover landscape design, irrigation, hardscapes, tree service, pools, water features, artificial turf, and lighting. One point of contact for everything.

faqs.question: Are your crews licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Every crew is fully licensed, bonded, and insured. We are BBB A+ accredited, ALCA certified, and a Weathermatic Premier Partner. Your property and our workers are protected on every job.

faqs.question: How do your irrigation systems save water?
faqs.answer: We install Weathermatic Smartline controllers with EPA WaterSense designation. These systems adjust watering based on real-time weather data and soil conditions, delivering an average 38% reduction in water usage without sacrificing landscape health.

testimonials.name: Rachelle R.
testimonials.text: What I appreciate most about Greenscapes is how open they are to receiving feedback and supporting their customers with any questions or concerns. Excellent service. And they are always so willing to give back to the community.

testimonials.name: Mike M.
testimonials.text: We had a complete front and back landscaping redesign done by Greenscapes. The Design Manager was always responsive, very patient, friendly, had great design ideas, and helped us stay within our budget. We recommend them to everyone.

testimonials.name: Haley H.
testimonials.text: Awesome company. We have been working with them for about two years now and have nothing but good things to say. Reliable, professional, and they truly care about doing quality work every time.

contact.headline:
Ready to Transform
Your Outdoor Space?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation consultation and detailed estimate. One call covers landscaping, hardscapes, irrigation, pools, and more.

footer.description: Family-owned landscape company serving the Phoenix metro since 2003. Licensed, bonded, and insured.
